variables.name: --shadow-md
variables.value: 0 4px 6px -1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--neutral-950), transparent 90%), 0 2px 4px -2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--neutral-950), transparent 90%)

variables.name: --shadow-lg
variables.value: 0 10px 15px -3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--neutral-950), transparent 90%), 0 4px 6px -4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--neutral-950), transparent 90%)

variables.name: --shadow-xl
variables.value: 0 20px 25px -5px color-mix(in oklch, var(--neutral-950), transparent 90%), 0 8px 10px -6px color-mix(in oklch, var(--neutral-950), transparent 90%)
